stonetop.summary: A possessing, screaming Voice spawned of Hlad's vortex, making mouths and wraiths.

system.concept: A possessing, screaming Voice spawned of Hlad's vortex, making mouths and wraiths.
system.description: Hidden in the southern arm of the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.RxUdCkI2lL6gE5IH]{Huffel Peaks}, there is a gorge that splits a mountain, cloaked in constantly churning mist, cold and clammy. At the base of the gorge is a thin split in reality — a vortex, a manifestation of Hlad the Devourer, sucking in everything it touches. The mountain is shunned now, but the @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.JDCcrvQhMYFFlUIe]{Barrow Builders} once fed the vortex gifts, offerings, and living, screaming sacrifice. In time, these offerings gave the vortex a Voice. And the Voice roams the mountain still.
